execution: Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation articleUpdate) — applies the dry-run cleanup recorded in article-cleanup-2026-05-20-corpus-scan.json. Canonical CMS body was re-fetched at apply time to confirm no drift since the scan; cleanup wrapper /tmp/article-clean.mjs ran the same regex passes as scripts/seo-article-cleanup.mjs.
expected_seo_impact: Strips 32 external competitor link wrappers (sleepfoundation.org, eachnight.com, investopedia.com — sites that compete for the same mattress-buying queries). Stops bleeding PageRank to competitor domains; refocuses link equity on our own product/collection pages. Removes 9 parasitic text-fragment anchors (`#:~:text=`) that Google interprets as deep-link references to competitor content.
verification:
Each article re-fetched after articleUpdate; updatedAt advanced to the appliedAt timestamps above. Balance check on cleaned bodies passes (matched /

open/close counts). Cumulative -6625 chars matches the sum of per-article dry-run deltas.
followup: Audit covered only 7 articles from mattress-buying-guide. A broader scan covering 30-50 promotional/seasonal articles would likely surface additional cleanup candidates (estimating 20-40 articles across the ~600-article corpus have similar cruft based on the 3/4 hit rate in promotional content).
